meta.name: test-project-v4
meta.goal: Test the hoyeon-cli spec validation with a legacy v4 fixture

context.request: Legacy v4 spec for backward compatibility testing

interview.decision: Use v4 schema_version to test backward compat path

scenarios.given: A valid v4 spec.json with schema_version=v4
